name: Review session shows confidence rating before answer reveal
description: When the review page loads, it shows EITHER a confidence-gate UI (cards with 1-5 confidence buttons that must be clicked before Reveal Answer appears), OR a session-complete screen, OR an empty state. The confidence gate is the primary feature being tested, but the test must not fail if the account has no due cards.

planSteps.description: Log in with valid credentials and wait for the dashboard to finish loading
Navigate to the Today's Memories review page via the /app/review route
If a tour or onboarding popup appears, dismiss it

Verify the page loaded correctly — it shows EITHER (a) a review card with confidence rating buttons (numbers 1 through 5 or labels like 'Can't recall' through 'Certain') visible BEFORE any 'Reveal Answer' button, confirming the JOL confidence gate is active, OR (b) a session-complete or empty-state screen. The page must NOT be a 404 or blank container.
